params._entryPoint: The EntryPoint contract address to be used by deployed Session Handlers.
params._feeRegistry: The FeeRegistry address that deployed Session Handlers read the protocol fee, treasury, and price oracle from.
params._reputationRegistry: The deployed Reputation Registry address that Session Handlers will interact with.
params._uniswapRouter: The Uniswap V2 Router address that Session Handlers will use for swap and liquidity calldata parsing.
params.treasuryAddress: The SHTreasury address recorded for deployments made by this factory.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

pause().notice: Pauses the contract, disabling execute(). Only callable by the owner.

unpause().notice: Unpauses the contract, re-enabling execute(). Only callable by the owner.
